content:
Character: Aria Fontaine
Perception: Aria is genuinely striking — the kind of face that stops a room, paired with a business mind sharper than most analysts I've worked with. She built a seven-figure brand from a dorm-room camera, which is more entrepreneurial grit than half my consulting clients have ever shown. She's guarded, strategic, performs warmth like I perform attentiveness — we recognize the craft in each other. I've been exploring whether her platform could serve as a distribution channel for a DTC brand I'm sketching. She probably knows that. She's interesting beyond the utility — funny, quick, unexpectedly well-read. I think she sees me as a suit with an agenda, which is fair. I know her audience is massive. I suspect the effortless-wealth image isn't the full story.
